locality_summary.headline: Andheri West: Lively, Connected, Chaotic, Pricey
locality_summary.overall_summary: Andheri West is a vibrant and well-connected Mumbai locality, favored for its entertainment options, proximity to media hubs, and excellent transport links including the Metro, railway, and highways. However, it struggles with persistent traffic congestion, waterlogging during monsoons, and high living costs. The area offers a bustling urban lifestyle but faces challenges in infrastructure and affordability.
top_highlights: Excellent connectivity (Metro, Railway, Highways)
Vibrant nightlife and entertainment scene
Proximity to media and film industry
Access to good hospitals and educational institutions
Convenient shopping malls and markets (Lokhandwala, Infiniti)
watchouts_or_gaps: Severe traffic congestion, especially during peak hours
Frequent waterlogging during monsoon season
High property prices and rents
Lack of parking spaces and poor waste management in some areas
best_for: Young professionals in media and entertainment
Individuals seeking a lively urban lifestyle
Those prioritizing connectivity and convenience
not_ideal_for: Individuals seeking a peaceful, quiet environment
Budget-conscious residents
evidence_notes: "I love how it makes me feel like staying in an exclusive area, with so many movie and television celebrities staying here."
"The Metro and the Link Road help to simplify travel. Although rather costly, it's rather worth it."
"The traffic is becoming a nightmare, and so many people are crowding the area."

locality_summary.headline: Andheri West: Lively, Connected, Chaotic, Pricey
locality_summary.overall_summary: Andheri West is a vibrant and well-connected Mumbai locality, favored for its entertainment options, proximity to media hubs, and excellent transport links including the Metro, railway, and highways. However, it struggles with persistent traffic congestion, waterlogging during monsoons, and high living costs. The area offers a bustling urban lifestyle but faces challenges in infrastructure and affordability.
top_highlights: Excellent connectivity (Metro, Railway, Highways)
Vibrant nightlife and entertainment scene
Proximity to media and film industry
Access to good hospitals and educational institutions
Convenient shopping malls and markets (Lokhandwala, Infiniti)
watchouts_or_gaps: Severe traffic congestion, especially during peak hours
Frequent waterlogging during monsoon season
High property prices and rents
Lack of parking spaces and poor waste management in some areas
best_for: Young professionals in media and entertainment
Individuals seeking a lively urban lifestyle
Those prioritizing connectivity and convenience
not_ideal_for: Individuals seeking a peaceful, quiet environment
Budget-conscious residents
evidence_notes: "I love how it makes me feel like staying in an exclusive area, with so many movie and television celebrities staying here."
"The Metro and the Link Road help to simplify travel. Although rather costly, it's rather worth it."
"The traffic is becoming a nightmare, and so many people are crowding the area."

locality_summary.headline: Andheri West: Lively, Connected, Chaotic, Pricey
locality_summary.overall_summary: Andheri West is a vibrant and well-connected Mumbai locality, favored for its entertainment options, proximity to media hubs, and excellent transport links including the Metro, railway, and highways. However, it struggles with persistent traffic congestion, waterlogging during monsoons, and high living costs. The area offers a bustling urban lifestyle but faces challenges in infrastructure and affordability.
top_highlights: Excellent connectivity (Metro, Railway, Highways)
Vibrant nightlife and entertainment scene
Proximity to media and film industry
Access to good hospitals and educational institutions
Convenient shopping malls and markets (Lokhandwala, Infiniti)
watchouts_or_gaps: Severe traffic congestion, especially during peak hours
Frequent waterlogging during monsoon season
High property prices and rents
Lack of parking spaces and poor waste management in some areas
best_for: Young professionals in media and entertainment
Individuals seeking a lively urban lifestyle
Those prioritizing connectivity and convenience
not_ideal_for: Individuals seeking a peaceful, quiet environment
Budget-conscious residents
evidence_notes: "I love how it makes me feel like staying in an exclusive area, with so many movie and television celebrities staying here."
"The Metro and the Link Road help to simplify travel. Although rather costly, it's rather worth it."
"The traffic is becoming a nightmare, and so many people are crowding the area."

metadata.title: Flats for Sale in Andheri West, Mumbai | Square Yards
metadata.meta_description: Explore resale properties in Andheri West, Mumbai with prices, BHK options, nearby localities, and current market signals on Square Yards.
metadata.h1: Resale Properties in Andheri West, Mumbai
metadata.intro_snippet: Discover a variety of flats for sale in Andheri West, Mumbai, including 1 BHK, 2 BHK, and 3 BHK options. View current asking price details and explore resale flats in this locality on Square Yards.

sections.title: Resale Property Overview in Andheri West, Mumbai
sections.body: This page provides an overview of resale flats for sale in Andheri West, Mumbai, located in the Mumbai Western Suburbs micromarket. Currently, there are 2,039 resale listings available across 1,762 projects. The canonical asking price for properties here is ₹40,238 per square foot. This overview aims to assist buyers in exploring resale options in Andheri West.

sections.title: Resale Market Snapshot
sections.body: Andheri West's resale market currently has 2,039 properties available for sale and 4,070 for rent, making a total of 6,109 listings. The average asking price in this locality is ₹40,238. Resale listings commonly include 1 BHK, 2 BHK, and 3 BHK flats, offering a range of unit sizes and price points.

sections.title: Price Trends and Rates
sections.body: The asking price in Andheri West has shown an upward trend over recent quarters. In March 2025, the asking price was ₹37,975 per square foot, which increased to ₹40,238 per square foot by December 2025. This indicates a gradual rise in asking prices within the locality compared to the micromarket rate, which was ₹21,180 per square foot in December 2025.

sections.title: BHK and Inventory Mix
sections.body: The resale inventory in Andheri West primarily consists of apartments, with 1,658 apartment listings distributed across various BHK configurations: 3 BHK (666 units), 2 BHK (576 units), 1 BHK (140 units), 4 BHK (114 units), 5 BHK (49 units), and 6 BHK (9 units). Builder floors account for 201 listings, including 3 BHK (122 units) and 4 BHK (70 units). Other property types include office spaces (141 listings), shops (14 listings), showrooms (10 listings), penthouses (6 listings), villas (5 listings), independent houses (3 listings), and plots (1 listing).

sections.title: Nearby Localities Buyers Can Also Explore
sections.body: Nearby localities to Andheri West with resale listings include Mudran Press Colony (11 sale listings, average price ₹45,337 per sq ft), Suresh Nagar (4 sale listings, average price ₹40,345 per sq ft), Bhudargarh Colony (5 sale listings, average price ₹41,806 per sq ft), Sv Patel Nagar (38 sale listings, average price ₹29,775 per sq ft), Shashtri Nagar (17 sale listings, average price ₹45,056 per sq ft), and Seven Bunglow (4 sale listings, average price ₹60,821 per sq ft). These localities offer additional options for buyers considering properties near Andheri West.

sections.title: Status and Readiness Snapshot
sections.body: Resale properties in Andheri West are available across various construction statuses. Ready To Move units number 957 with an average asking price of ₹31,639 per square foot. Well Occupied properties total 433 units at an average price of ₹31,857 per square foot. Other statuses include Advanced Stage (2 units), Partially Ready To Move (4 units), Mid Stage (5 units), Under Construction (77 units), and New Launch (25 units), with average prices ranging from ₹33,256 to ₹44,546 per square foot depending on status.

sections.title: Review and Rating Signals
sections.body: Andheri West has received 97 reviews with an average rating of 4.24 out of 5. The distribution of ratings includes 40 five-star, 43 four-star, 12 three-star, 1 two-star, and 1 one-star reviews. The AI summary highlights the locality's connectivity and entertainment options, while also noting challenges such as traffic congestion and waterlogging during monsoons.

sections.title: Demand and Supply Signals
sections.body: Available sale-side signals show sale available count is 2039. Unit-type demand and supply inputs indicate for 1 BHK, listing count is 142, demand percent is 18, supply percent is 8. Listing-range inputs show listing range document count is 1933, minimum listed price is ₹2,320,000, maximum listed price is ₹4,900,000,000.

sections.title: Property Type Signals
sections.body: The average asking prices for property types in Andheri West are: shops at ₹78,643 per sq ft, office spaces at ₹45,508 per sq ft, villas at ₹51,864 per sq ft, and apartments at ₹40,238 per sq ft. Regarding property status, Ready To Move units average ₹31,639 per sq ft, Well Occupied ₹31,857, Advanced Stage ₹33,739, Partially Ready To Move ₹44,546, Mid Stage ₹34,944, Under Construction ₹34,903, and New Launch ₹33,256 per sq ft. Location-wise, average rates include Veera Desai Road at ₹33,765, Yari Road ₹32,638, Jogeshwari West ₹28,345, Gulmohar Road ₹57,726, Juhu ₹60,242, Goregaon West ₹33,246, Jogeshwari East ₹27,078, Juhu Road ₹45,398, Madh ₹27,303, and Vile Parle West ₹48,142 per square foot.

sections.title: Property Type Rate Snapshot
sections.body: Property-type rate inputs show property type is shop, average listed value in this input is ₹78,643, change percent is -6.11. Apartment appears in the sale property-type mix, document count is 1658. Status inputs indicate status bucket is Ready To Move, units are 957, average price is ₹31,639. Location-rate inputs show location name is Veera Desai Road, average rate is ₹33,765, change percentage is 0.

sections.title: What Buyers Can Explore Here
sections.body: Buyers looking for resale flats in Andheri West can explore a range of options including 1 BHK, 2 BHK, and 3 BHK flats across apartments, builder floors, and other property types. The asking price averages ₹40,238 per square foot. Quick links are available for new projects, new launches, ready-to-move, and under-construction projects in Andheri West. Detailed listings by unit type and property type can help buyers navigate available options.

faqs.question: Which BHK options are commonly available in Andheri West, Mumbai?
faqs.answer: Commonly available BHK options in Andheri West resale market include 3 BHK (789 listings), 2 BHK (579 listings), 4 BHK (188 listings), and 1 BHK (141 listings). Other options like 5 BHK, 6 BHK, 1 RK, and Studio are also available but in smaller numbers.

locality_summary.headline: Andheri West: Lively, Connected, Chaotic, Pricey
locality_summary.overall_summary: Andheri West is a vibrant and well-connected Mumbai locality, favored for its entertainment options, proximity to media hubs, and excellent transport links including the Metro, railway, and highways. However, it struggles with persistent traffic congestion, waterlogging during monsoons, and high living costs. The area offers a bustling urban lifestyle but faces challenges in infrastructure and affordability.
top_highlights: Excellent connectivity (Metro, Railway, Highways)
Vibrant nightlife and entertainment scene
Proximity to media and film industry
Access to good hospitals and educational institutions
Convenient shopping malls and markets (Lokhandwala, Infiniti)
watchouts_or_gaps: Severe traffic congestion, especially during peak hours
Frequent waterlogging during monsoon season
High property prices and rents
Lack of parking spaces and poor waste management in some areas
best_for: Young professionals in media and entertainment
Individuals seeking a lively urban lifestyle
Those prioritizing connectivity and convenience
not_ideal_for: Individuals seeking a peaceful, quiet environment
Budget-conscious residents
evidence_notes: "I love how it makes me feel like staying in an exclusive area, with so many movie and television celebrities staying here."
"The Metro and the Link Road help to simplify travel. Although rather costly, it's rather worth it."
"The traffic is becoming a nightmare, and so many people are crowding the area."

metadata.h1: Resale Properties in Andheri West, Mumbai
metadata.intro_snippet: Discover a variety of flats for sale in Andheri West, Mumbai, including 1 BHK, 2 BHK, and 3 BHK options. View current asking price details and explore resale flats in this locality on Square Yards.

sections.title: Resale Property Overview in Andheri West, Mumbai
sections.body: This page provides an overview of resale flats for sale in Andheri West, Mumbai, located in the Mumbai Western Suburbs micromarket. Currently, there are 2,039 resale listings available across 1,762 projects. The canonical asking price for properties here is ₹40,238 per square foot. This overview aims to assist buyers in exploring resale options in Andheri West.

sections.title: Resale Market Snapshot
sections.body: Andheri West's resale market currently has 2,039 properties available for sale and 4,070 for rent, making a total of 6,109 listings. The average asking price in this locality is ₹40,238. Resale listings commonly include 1 BHK, 2 BHK, and 3 BHK flats, offering a range of unit sizes and price points.

sections.title: Price Trends and Rates
sections.body: The asking price in Andheri West has shown an upward trend over recent quarters. In March 2025, the asking price was ₹37,975 per square foot, which increased to ₹40,238 per square foot by December 2025. This indicates a gradual rise in asking prices within the locality compared to the micromarket rate, which was ₹21,180 per square foot in December 2025.

sections.title: BHK and Inventory Mix
sections.body: The resale inventory in Andheri West primarily consists of apartments, with 1,658 apartment listings distributed across various BHK configurations: 3 BHK (666 units), 2 BHK (576 units), 1 BHK (140 units), 4 BHK (114 units), 5 BHK (49 units), and 6 BHK (9 units). Builder floors account for 201 listings, including 3 BHK (122 units) and 4 BHK (70 units). Other property types include office spaces (141 listings), shops (14 listings), showrooms (10 listings), penthouses (6 listings), villas (5 listings), independent houses (3 listings), and plots (1 listing).

sections.title: Nearby Localities Buyers Can Also Explore
sections.body: Nearby localities to Andheri West with resale listings include Mudran Press Colony (11 sale listings, average price ₹45,337 per sq ft), Suresh Nagar (4 sale listings, average price ₹40,345 per sq ft), Bhudargarh Colony (5 sale listings, average price ₹41,806 per sq ft), Sv Patel Nagar (38 sale listings, average price ₹29,775 per sq ft), Shashtri Nagar (17 sale listings, average price ₹45,056 per sq ft), and Seven Bunglow (4 sale listings, average price ₹60,821 per sq ft). These localities offer additional options for buyers considering properties near Andheri West.

sections.title: Status and Readiness Snapshot
sections.body: Resale properties in Andheri West are available across various construction statuses. Ready To Move units number 957 with an average asking price of ₹31,639 per square foot. Well Occupied properties total 433 units at an average price of ₹31,857 per square foot. Other statuses include Advanced Stage (2 units), Partially Ready To Move (4 units), Mid Stage (5 units), Under Construction (77 units), and New Launch (25 units), with average prices ranging from ₹33,256 to ₹44,546 per square foot depending on status.

sections.title: Review and Rating Signals
sections.body: Andheri West has received 97 reviews with an average rating of 4.24 out of 5. The distribution of ratings includes 40 five-star, 43 four-star, 12 three-star, 1 two-star, and 1 one-star reviews. The AI summary highlights the locality's connectivity and entertainment options, while also noting challenges such as traffic congestion and waterlogging during monsoons.

sections.title: Demand and Supply Signals
sections.body: Available sale-side signals show sale available count is 2039. Unit-type demand and supply inputs indicate for 1 BHK, listing count is 142, demand percent is 18, supply percent is 8. Listing-range inputs show listing range document count is 1933, minimum listed price is ₹2,320,000, maximum listed price is ₹4,900,000,000.

sections.title: Property Type Signals
sections.body: The average asking prices for property types in Andheri West are: shops at ₹78,643 per sq ft, office spaces at ₹45,508 per sq ft, villas at ₹51,864 per sq ft, and apartments at ₹40,238 per sq ft. Regarding property status, Ready To Move units average ₹31,639 per sq ft, Well Occupied ₹31,857, Advanced Stage ₹33,739, Partially Ready To Move ₹44,546, Mid Stage ₹34,944, Under Construction ₹34,903, and New Launch ₹33,256 per sq ft. Location-wise, average rates include Veera Desai Road at ₹33,765, Yari Road ₹32,638, Jogeshwari West ₹28,345, Gulmohar Road ₹57,726, Juhu ₹60,242, Goregaon West ₹33,246, Jogeshwari East ₹27,078, Juhu Road ₹45,398, Madh ₹27,303, and Vile Parle West ₹48,142 per square foot.

locality_summary.headline: Andheri West: Lively, Connected, Chaotic, Pricey
locality_summary.overall_summary: Andheri West is a vibrant and well-connected Mumbai locality, favored for its entertainment options, proximity to media hubs, and excellent transport links including the Metro, railway, and highways. However, it struggles with persistent traffic congestion, waterlogging during monsoons, and high living costs. The area offers a bustling urban lifestyle but faces challenges in infrastructure and affordability.
top_highlights: Excellent connectivity (Metro, Railway, Highways)
Vibrant nightlife and entertainment scene

## Resale Property Overview in Andheri West, Mumbai

This page provides an overview of resale flats for sale in Andheri West, Mumbai, located in the Mumbai Western Suburbs micromarket. Currently, there are 2,039 resale listings available across 1,762 projects. The canonical asking price for properties here is ₹40,238 per square foot. This overview aims to assist buyers in exploring resale options in Andheri West.

## Resale Market Snapshot

Andheri West's resale market currently has 2,039 properties available for sale and 4,070 for rent, making a total of 6,109 listings. The average asking price in this locality is ₹40,238. Resale listings commonly include 1 BHK, 2 BHK, and 3 BHK flats, offering a range of unit sizes and price points.

## Price Trends and Rates

The asking price in Andheri West has shown an upward trend over recent quarters. In March 2025, the asking price was ₹37,975 per square foot, which increased to ₹40,238 per square foot by December 2025. This indicates a gradual rise in asking prices within the locality compared to the micromarket rate, which was ₹21,180 per square foot in December 2025.

## BHK and Inventory Mix

The resale inventory in Andheri West primarily consists of apartments, with 1,658 apartment listings distributed across various BHK configurations: 3 BHK (666 units), 2 BHK (576 units), 1 BHK (140 units), 4 BHK (114 units), 5 BHK (49 units), and 6 BHK (9 units). Builder floors account for 201 listings, including 3 BHK (122 units) and 4 BHK (70 units). Other property types include office spaces (141 listings), shops (14 listings), showrooms (10 listings), penthouses (6 listings), villas (5 listings), independent houses (3 listings), and plots (1 listing).

## Nearby Localities Buyers Can Also Explore

Nearby localities to Andheri West with resale listings include Mudran Press Colony (11 sale listings, average price ₹45,337 per sq ft), Suresh Nagar (4 sale listings, average price ₹40,345 per sq ft), Bhudargarh Colony (5 sale listings, average price ₹41,806 per sq ft), Sv Patel Nagar (38 sale listings, average price ₹29,775 per sq ft), Shashtri Nagar (17 sale listings, average price ₹45,056 per sq ft), and Seven Bunglow (4 sale listings, average price ₹60,821 per sq ft). These localities offer additional options for buyers considering properties near Andheri West.

sections.title: Resale Property Overview in Andheri West, Mumbai
sections.body: This page provides an overview of resale flats for sale in Andheri West, Mumbai, located in the Mumbai Western Suburbs micromarket. Currently, there are 2,039 resale listings available across 1,762 projects. The canonical asking price for properties here is ₹40,238 per square foot. This overview aims to assist buyers in exploring resale options in Andheri West.

sections.title: Resale Market Snapshot
sections.body: Andheri West's resale market currently has 2,039 properties available for sale and 4,070 for rent, making a total of 6,109 listings. The average asking price in this locality is ₹40,238. Resale listings commonly include 1 BHK, 2 BHK, and 3 BHK flats, offering a range of unit sizes and price points.

sections.title: Price Trends and Rates
sections.body: The asking price in Andheri West has shown an upward trend over recent quarters. In March 2025, the asking price was ₹37,975 per square foot, which increased to ₹40,238 per square foot by December 2025. This indicates a gradual rise in asking prices within the locality compared to the micromarket rate, which was ₹21,180 per square foot in December 2025.

sections.title: BHK and Inventory Mix
sections.body: The resale inventory in Andheri West primarily consists of apartments, with 1,658 apartment listings distributed across various BHK configurations: 3 BHK (666 units), 2 BHK (576 units), 1 BHK (140 units), 4 BHK (114 units), 5 BHK (49 units), and 6 BHK (9 units). Builder floors account for 201 listings, including 3 BHK (122 units) and 4 BHK (70 units). Other property types include office spaces (141 listings), shops (14 listings), showrooms (10 listings), penthouses (6 listings), villas (5 listings), independent houses (3 listings), and plots (1 listing).

sections.title: Nearby Localities Buyers Can Also Explore
sections.body: Nearby localities to Andheri West with resale listings include Mudran Press Colony (11 sale listings, average price ₹45,337 per sq ft), Suresh Nagar (4 sale listings, average price ₹40,345 per sq ft), Bhudargarh Colony (5 sale listings, average price ₹41,806 per sq ft), Sv Patel Nagar (38 sale listings, average price ₹29,775 per sq ft), Shashtri Nagar (17 sale listings, average price ₹45,056 per sq ft), and Seven Bunglow (4 sale listings, average price ₹60,821 per sq ft). These localities offer additional options for buyers considering properties near Andheri West.

sections.title: Status and Readiness Snapshot
sections.body: Resale properties in Andheri West are available across various construction statuses. Ready To Move units number 957 with an average asking price of ₹31,639 per square foot. Well Occupied properties total 433 units at an average price of ₹31,857 per square foot. Other statuses include Advanced Stage (2 units), Partially Ready To Move (4 units), Mid Stage (5 units), Under Construction (77 units), and New Launch (25 units), with average prices ranging from ₹33,256 to ₹44,546 per square foot depending on status.

sections.title: Review and Rating Signals
sections.body: Andheri West has received 97 reviews with an average rating of 4.24 out of 5. The distribution of ratings includes 40 five-star, 43 four-star, 12 three-star, 1 two-star, and 1 one-star reviews. The AI summary highlights the locality's connectivity and entertainment options, while also noting challenges such as traffic congestion and waterlogging during monsoons.

sections.title: Demand and Supply Signals
sections.body: Available sale-side signals show sale available count is 2039. Unit-type demand and supply inputs indicate for 1 BHK, listing count is 142, demand percent is 18, supply percent is 8. Listing-range inputs show listing range document count is 1933, minimum listed price is ₹2,320,000, maximum listed price is ₹4,900,000,000.

sections.title: Property Type Signals
sections.body: The average asking prices for property types in Andheri West are: shops at ₹78,643 per sq ft, office spaces at ₹45,508 per sq ft, villas at ₹51,864 per sq ft, and apartments at ₹40,238 per sq ft. Regarding property status, Ready To Move units average ₹31,639 per sq ft, Well Occupied ₹31,857, Advanced Stage ₹33,739, Partially Ready To Move ₹44,546, Mid Stage ₹34,944, Under Construction ₹34,903, and New Launch ₹33,256 per sq ft. Location-wise, average rates include Veera Desai Road at ₹33,765, Yari Road ₹32,638, Jogeshwari West ₹28,345, Gulmohar Road ₹57,726, Juhu ₹60,242, Goregaon West ₹33,246, Jogeshwari East ₹27,078, Juhu Road ₹45,398, Madh ₹27,303, and Vile Parle West ₹48,142 per square foot.

sections.title: Property Type Rate Snapshot
sections.body: Property-type rate inputs show property type is shop, average listed value in this input is ₹78,643, change percent is -6.11. Apartment appears in the sale property-type mix, document count is 1658. Status inputs indicate status bucket is Ready To Move, units are 957, average price is ₹31,639. locality_summary.headline: Andheri West: Lively, Connected, Chaotic, Pricey
locality_summary.overall_summary: Andheri West is a vibrant and well-connected Mumbai locality, favored for its entertainment options, proximity to media hubs, and excellent transport links including the Metro, railway, and highways. However, it struggles with persistent traffic congestion, waterlogging during monsoons, and high living costs. The area offers a bustling urban lifestyle but faces challenges in infrastructure and affordability.
top_highlights: Excellent connectivity (Metro, Railway, Highways)
Vibrant nightlife and entertainment scene
Proximity to media and film industry
Access to good hospitals and educational institutions
Convenient shopping malls and markets (Lokhandwala, Infiniti)
watchouts_or_gaps: Severe traffic congestion, especially during peak hours
Frequent waterlogging during monsoon season
High property prices and rents
Lack of parking spaces and poor waste management in some areas
best_for: Young professionals in media and entertainment
Individuals seeking a lively urban lifestyle
Those prioritizing connectivity and convenience
not_ideal_for: Individuals seeking a peaceful, quiet environment
Budget-conscious residents
evidence_notes: "I love how it makes me feel like staying in an exclusive area, with so many movie and television celebrities staying here."
"The Metro and the Link Road help to simplify travel. Although rather costly, it's rather worth it."
"The traffic is becoming a nightmare, and so many people are crowding the area."

However, it struggles with persistent traffic congestion, waterlogging during monsoons, and high living costs. The area offers a bustling urban lifestyle but faces challenges in infrastructure and affordability.
top_highlights: Excellent connectivity (Metro, Railway, Highways)
Vibrant nightlife and entertainment scene
Proximity to media and film industry
Access to good hospitals and educational institutions
Convenient shopping malls and markets (Lokhandwala, Infiniti)
watchouts_or_gaps: Severe traffic congestion, especially during peak hours
Frequent waterlogging during monsoon season
High property prices and rents
Lack of parking spaces and poor waste management in some areas
best_for: Young professionals in media and entertainment
Individuals seeking a lively urban lifestyle
Those prioritizing connectivity and convenience
not_ideal_for: Individuals seeking a peaceful, quiet environment
Budget-conscious residents
evidence_notes: "I love how it makes me feel like staying in an exclusive area, with so many movie and television celebrities staying here."
"The Metro and the Link Road help to simplify travel. Although rather costly, it's rather worth it."
"The traffic is becoming a nightmare, and so many people are crowding the area."

locality_summary.headline: Andheri West: Lively, Connected, Chaotic, Pricey
locality_summary.overall_summary: Andheri West is a vibrant and well-connected Mumbai locality, favored for its entertainment options, proximity to media hubs, and excellent transport links including the Metro, railway, and highways. However, it struggles with persistent traffic congestion, waterlogging during monsoons, and high living costs. The area offers a bustling urban lifestyle but faces challenges in infrastructure and affordability.
top_highlights: Excellent connectivity (Metro, Railway, Highways)
Vibrant nightlife and entertainment scene
Proximity to media and film industry
Access to good hospitals and educational institutions
Convenient shopping malls and markets (Lokhandwala, Infiniti)
watchouts_or_gaps: Severe traffic congestion, especially during peak hours
Frequent waterlogging during monsoon season
High property prices and rents
Lack of parking spaces and poor waste management in some areas
best_for: Young professionals in media and entertainment
Individuals seeking a lively urban lifestyle
Those prioritizing connectivity and convenience
not_ideal_for: Individuals seeking a peaceful, quiet environment
Budget-conscious residents
evidence_notes: "I love how it makes me feel like staying in an exclusive area, with so many movie and television celebrities staying here."
"The Metro and the Link Road help to simplify travel. Although rather costly, it's rather worth it."
"The traffic is becoming a nightmare, and so many people are crowding the area."

# Resale Properties in Andheri West, Mumbai

**Title:** Flats for Sale in Andheri West, Mumbai | Square Yards

**Meta Description:** Explore resale properties in Andheri West, Mumbai with prices, BHK options, nearby localities, and current market signals on Square Yards.

Discover a variety of flats for sale in Andheri West, Mumbai, including 1 BHK, 2 BHK, and 3 BHK options. View current asking price details and explore resale flats in this locality on Square Yards.

## Quality Summary

**Approval Status:** warning
**Overall Quality Score:** 95

**Warnings:**
- low_distinct_term_ratio_detected

## Resale Property Overview in Andheri West, Mumbai

This page provides an overview of resale flats for sale in Andheri West, Mumbai, located in the Mumbai Western Suburbs micromarket. Currently, there are 2,039 resale listings available across 1,762 projects. The canonical asking price for properties here is ₹40,238 per square foot. This overview aims to assist buyers in exploring resale options in Andheri West.

## Resale Market Snapshot

Andheri West's resale market currently has 2,039 properties available for sale and 4,070 for rent, making a total of 6,109 listings. The average asking price in this locality is ₹40,238. Resale listings commonly include 1 BHK, 2 BHK, and 3 BHK flats, offering a range of unit sizes and price points.

## Price Trends and Rates

The asking price in Andheri West has shown an upward trend over recent quarters. In March 2025, the asking price was ₹37,975 per square foot, which increased to ₹40,238 per square foot by December 2025. This indicates a gradual rise in asking prices within the locality compared to the micromarket rate, which was ₹21,180 per square foot in December 2025.

## BHK and Inventory Mix

The resale inventory in Andheri West primarily consists of apartments, with 1,658 apartment listings distributed across various BHK configurations: 3 BHK (666 units), 2 BHK (576 units), 1 BHK (140 units), 4 BHK (114 units), 5 BHK (49 units), and 6 BHK (9 units). Builder floors account for 201 listings, including 3 BHK (122 units) and 4 BHK (70 units). Other property types include office spaces (141 listings), shops (14 listings), showrooms (10 listings), penthouses (6 listings), villas (5 listings), independent houses (3 listings), and plots (1 listing).

## Nearby Localities Buyers Can Also Explore

Nearby localities to Andheri West with resale listings include Mudran Press Colony (11 sale listings, average price ₹45,337 per sq ft), Suresh Nagar (4 sale listings, average price ₹40,345 per sq ft), Bhudargarh Colony (5 sale listings, average price ₹41,806 per sq ft), Sv Patel Nagar (38 sale listings, average price ₹29,775 per sq ft), Shashtri Nagar (17 sale listings, average price ₹45,056 per sq ft), and Seven Bunglow (4 sale listings, average price ₹60,821 per sq ft). These localities offer additional options for buyers considering properties near Andheri West.

## Status and Readiness Snapshot

Resale properties in Andheri West are available across various construction statuses. Ready To Move units number 957 with an average asking price of ₹31,639 per square foot. Well Occupied properties total 433 units at an average price of ₹31,857 per square foot. Other statuses include Advanced Stage (2 units), Partially Ready To Move (4 units), Mid Stage (5 units), Under Construction (77 units), and New Launch (25 units), with average prices ranging from ₹33,256 to ₹44,546 per square foot depending on status.

## Review and Rating Signals

Andheri West has received 97 reviews with an average rating of 4.24 out of 5. The distribution of ratings includes 40 five-star, 43 four-star, 12 three-star, 1 two-star, and 1 one-star reviews. The AI summary highlights the locality's connectivity and entertainment options, while also noting challenges such as traffic congestion and waterlogging during monsoons.

## Demand and Supply Signals

Available sale-side signals show sale available count is 2039. Unit-type demand and supply inputs indicate for 1 BHK, listing count is 142, demand percent is 18, supply percent is 8. Listing-range inputs show listing range document count is 1933, minimum listed price is ₹2,320,000, maximum listed price is ₹4,900,000,000.

## Property Type Signals

The average asking prices for property types in Andheri West are: shops at ₹78,643 per sq ft, office spaces at ₹45,508 per sq ft, villas at ₹51,864 per sq ft, and apartments at ₹40,238 per sq ft. Regarding property status, Ready To Move units average ₹31,639 per sq ft, Well Occupied ₹31,857, Advanced Stage ₹33,739, Partially Ready To Move ₹44,546, Mid Stage ₹34,944, Under Construction ₹34,903, and New Launch ₹33,256 per sq ft. Location-wise, average rates include Veera Desai Road at ₹33,765, Yari Road ₹32,638, Jogeshwari West ₹28,345, Gulmohar Road ₹57,726, Juhu ₹60,242, Goregaon West ₹33,246, Jogeshwari East ₹27,078, Juhu Road ₹45,398, Madh ₹27,303, and Vile Parle West ₹48,142 per square foot.

## Property Type Rate Snapshot

Property-type rate inputs show property type is shop, average listed value in this input is ₹78,643, change percent is -6.11. Apartment appears in the sale property-type mix, document count is 1658. Status inputs indicate status bucket is Ready To Move, units are 957, average price is ₹31,639. Location-rate inputs show location name is Veera Desai Road, average rate is ₹33,765, change percentage is 0.

## What Buyers Can Explore Here

Buyers looking for resale flats in Andheri West can explore a range of options including 1 BHK, 2 BHK, and 3 BHK flats across apartments, builder floors, and other property types. The asking price averages ₹40,238 per square foot. Quick links are available for new projects, new launches, ready-to-move, and under-construction projects in Andheri West. Detailed listings by unit type and property type can help buyers navigate available options.
